experiences.title: Senior Site Reliability Engineer
experiences.summary: Senior Site Reliability Engineer at IonicPartners [working for Gigster], in charge of the design and refactor of the legacy applications residing on GCP. Worked on refactoring AppScript applications to run on top of Lambda functions on AWS, that were called through an API Gateway. Integrated the application fully with Salesforce and Google services. Re-architected the application to run on ECS instead of GCP Cloud Run. Migrated part of the Salesforce DB into a Neo4J [GraphDB]. Created a new application [Lambda + API Gateway] that assist on searching for candidates making queries to Neo4J.
jobDescription: To design and improve current services.
To help migrate services into AWS from GCP.
To implement a GraphDB and help create the search algorithm.
To improve the CI/CD overall process.
To minimize cost through the use of economies of scale.

projects.title: AppScript refactor
description: Design the new architecture for the application.
Refactor the AppScript code to run with NodeJS.
Integrate the platform to make use of GDrive and AWS services.
Develop the Infrastructure-as-Code for everything that has been deployed.

projects.title: Neo4J deployment
description: Design the new schema for the GraphDB relationships.
Get Salesforce data into GraphDB.
Create a Lambda + API Gateway to perform lookups in Neo4J.
Assist on the development for the search algorithm and user qualification.

experiences.title: Senior Site Reliability Engineer
experiences.summary: Senior Site Reliability Engineer at MajorKeyTech [working for XSell], in charge of the design and architecture of the AWS & Azure platforms. Joined the company to assist them on having a better architecture on the AWS & Azure accounts. Worked on setting up integrations between the AWS accounts, by creating an AWS Organization from scratch, migrating the AWS accounts, implementing AWS SSO plus AWS VPN Client integrated with Okta. Created the repository that holds the Infrastructure-as-Code and developed the guidelines on how to work on it as the starting point of having everything on code. Developed the entire network topology between AWS VPCs & Azure networks using VirtualWAN & VirtualHub. Worked with the internal teams setting up the proper permissions for each one to access only those resources that are inherently required by the role.
jobDescription: To design and implement a new AWS Account & Azure subscription architecture.
To design and develop the infrastructure with Terraform.
To implement RBAC through the use of Okta.
To provide support, administration and consulting services for AWS & Azure.
To lead any project that requires expertise in any technology.

projects.title: AWS & Azure re-design
description: Design the AWS Account & Azure subscription structure.
Create folders/OUs to handle certain environments or requirements.
Implement and migrate accounts/subs into the new architecture.
Develop the Infrastructure-as-Code for everything that has been designed.
Implement SSO through the use of Okta.

experiences.title: Senior Python Developer
experiences.summary: Senior Python Developer at MajorKeyTech [working for MGstover], in charge of the development of Python code to handle a cryptocurrency portfolio manager for several customers. Joined the team with the sole purpose of assisting in finishing the project in the time needed, but ended up working on the AWS side as well to improve the overall platform and create the proper architecture to handle this application that was running on Docker Swarm. Developed the CI/CD pipeline to get the code deployed into non-production environments and accelerate the shipment between sprints. Refactored part of the application to handle better the queries against the database and make use of multi-threading capabilities alongside async functions to speed up the responses.
jobDescription: To develop a Python application to manage cryptocurrency portfolios.
To implement multi-threading and async functions to improve the UX.
To refactor the application as per the 12factorapp guidelines.
To provide support & administration of AWS Services.
To create a CI/CD pipeline to speed up the development process.

projects.title: Cryptocurrency Portfolio Manager development
description: Develop the Python application to handle multiple portfolios from different cryptocurrency platforms [such as Coinbase].
Improve the application making use of multi-threading and async functions.
Refactor the application according to the 12factorapp guidelines.
Create a CI/CD pipeline that kicked in from GitHub Actions to get the code deployed into Docker Swarm.
Handle incidents and bugfixes on the code.

experiences.title: Principal Site Reliability Engineer
experiences.summary: Principal Site Reliability Engineer at MajorKeyTech [working for iHerb], in charge of the design and the deployment of an observability platform from scratch to cover 100% of the Kubernetes infrastructure that was deployed between AWS & On-Prem datacenters. Designed a full stack with Grafana, Grafana Loki, Grafana Tempo, Prometheus & Thanos, through the usage of Helm Charts and Azure DevOps Pipelines for the deployment in each Kubernetes cluster.
jobDescription: To design and deploy a full-fledged observability platform.
To coordinate different teams to get the observability platform up and running.
To create dashboards as an example to assist on showing the strengths of the platform.
To evangelize developers to get them on board of the new platform.
To create or assist in the creation of monitors to get custom metrics from the application.
To develop scripts that helped on shipping the logs between different platforms.
To resolve issues related to any application running in the Kubernetes platform.

projects.title: Design & Deployment of the Observability platform
description: Discover all the Kubernetes platforms and create an inventory for them.
Design a solution that will be able to monitor end-to-end any application running in the Kubernetes platform and outside, making use of object storage.
Create architectural documents and discuss with the rest of the SREs to gather new ideas or pinpoint any issues.
Write the code to deploy the observability platform in an automated way making use of RBAC.
Create the templates and pipelines in Azure DevOps Pipelines.
Create failsafe mechanisms to avoid losing the ability to monitor even if the main monitoring platform goes down.

jobDescription: To lead and assist on the migration to Terraform Cloud.
